article.title: Noizekid: A Profile of the Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer mark his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid stands out as a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer with a growing list of high-profile collaborations and a distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent figures in the music industry. His work has intersected with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer, establishing him as a notable figure in the electronic music scene.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums, offering insight into the sonic elements that define his productions.
His approach to production is characterized by a blend of moombahton and dancehall influences, resulting in a distinctive sound that has garnered attention both in Mexico and internationally.

Noizekid's trajectory is further evidenced by his associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to a vibrant and evolving electronic music landscape.
